title: cotyledon calycina
intro: Cotyledon calycina, also known as the 'Oyster Plant' or 'Spoon Plant', is a succulent species belonging to the family Crassulaceae. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. Its health benefits include soothing skin irritations, reducing inflammation, and promoting wound healing. Herbal preparations of Cotyledon calycina can be made into a salve, ointment, or infused oil to utilize its medicinal properties, although further research is necessary to confirm its effectiveness.
